name: Buddy Bash
short_description: Buddy Bash is a physics-based single and multiplayer 2D platformer arcade game that combines parkour moves and firearms into a cute, yet brutal, cocktail of friendly competitive fun!
detailed_description:
Challenges Update out NOW!

The big Challenges update is out now! This update adds single player / co-operative challenges mode to the game, as well as full controller support and fixes a number of bugs. Oh, and some new battle levels and weapons!


About the Game



Buddy Bash is a physics-based multiplayer 2D platformer arcade game that combines parkour moves and firearms into a cute, yet brutal, cocktail of friendly competitive fun!

  • CHALLENGES!

    Complete a number of single player / co-operative challenges

  • PHYSICS!

    Every fight plays differently while you use momentum to inflict maximum damage on your opponent(s)

  • DESTRUCTION!

    Bash your opponent into a wall or into the ground hard enough and you'll see them fly through it. Or just use a bazooka.

  • PARKOUR!

    Developed by parkour enthusiasts, the moves of your fighter are inspired by real life parkour movement

  • NEON!

    Enjoy the visual spectacle of your martial artists in the glow of 80s(tm) inspired neon lights

  • 1 TO 4 PLAYERS!

    Gather a group of friends on a coach to see who bashes their buddies the best!

  • ONLINE!

    Play with your online friends using Steam Remote Play!
